metadata.purpose: Comprehensive testing strategy, snapshot framework, golden-run baselines, stress suites, and regression gates

philosophy.principle: Every change must pass the full 1,034+ baseline test suite. No exceptions.
New features require tests BEFORE merge — no "we'll add tests later" debt.
Snapshot tests are the primary regression mechanism for compiler output.
Numerical correctness for fusion must be within epsilon < 1e-6 of unfused results.
Parallel execution must produce bit-identical results to sequential execution.

layer.name: Unit Tests
layer.description: Function-level tests within each module. Fastest feedback loop.

requirements.req: Every new public function must have at least 2 unit tests (normal + edge case).
Every new module must have >= 10 unit tests.
Tests use #[test] annotation, no external dependencies for unit tests.

targets.target: Accumulation, fatal(), severity override, display formatting, error codes
PassManager ordering, pass skipping, config parsing
Reachability, removal, warnings for user functions
Integer ops, float ops, overflow, division by zero
Each fusion pattern, non-fusion cases, cross-block rejection
DAG building, independence detection, side-effect exclusion
Use counting, zero-copy marking, multi-use detection
Inline decisions, size thresholds, single-use inlining
Interning, deduplication, equality, hash, coexistence with TypeInterner

layer.name: Integration Tests
layer.description: Cross-module tests that verify pipeline stages work together correctly.

requirements.req: Full pipeline tests: source → compile → run → verify output.
At least one integration test per new language feature.
Test error recovery: multiple errors in single compilation.

suite.name: diagnostics_integration
suite.test: multi_error_accumulation — program with 3+ errors shows all of them
warning_to_error_promotion — --deny upgrades warnings to errors
error_to_warning_demotion — --warn downgrades errors to warnings (where allowed)
phase_boundary_fatal — fatal() stops compilation between phases

suite.name: fusion_integration
suite.test: linear_relu_fusion_e2e — matmul+add+relu compiles to single fused call
mse_fusion_e2e — subtract+square+mean compiles to fused_mse call
elementwise_chain_e2e — 5 element-wise ops fuse to single pass
no_fusion_across_branch — fusion disabled when if/else separates ops
fusion_flag_toggle — -Ofuse-ops=off produces unfused code

suite.name: parallelism_integration
suite.test: independent_matmuls_parallel — two independent matmuls dispatch to thread pool
dependent_ops_sequential — data-dependent ops remain sequential
print_not_parallelized — side-effecting ops excluded from parallel regions
parallel_equals_sequential — 100 random programs produce identical results

suite.name: fold_reduce_integration
suite.test: reduce_product — reduce([1,2,3,4], |a,b| a*b) == 24
comprehension_map — [x*2 for x in [1,2,3]] == [2,4,6]
comprehension_filter — [x for x in [1,2,3,4,5] if x > 3] == [4,5]

suite.name: linearity_integration
suite.test: linear_single_use_ok — linear param used once compiles
linear_multi_use_error — linear param used twice is compile error
linear_no_use_error — linear param unused is compile error
linear_zero_copy_verified — allocation count is 0 for linear forward pass

suite.name: with_block_integration
suite.test: with_result_ok — with Result { ask x = Ok(1); Ok(x+1) } == Ok(2)
with_result_err — with Result { ask x = Err("e"); Ok(x) } == Err("e")
with_option_some — with Option { ask x = Some(1); Some(x+1) } == Some(2)
with_option_none — with Option { ask x = None; Some(x) } == None

layer.name: Snapshot Tests
layer.description: Golden-file tests using insta crate for compiler output verification.

requirements.req: At least 100 snapshot tests total across all categories.
Snapshots must be reviewed with cargo insta review before committing.
Snapshot names must be descriptive: category__specific_test_name.

category.name: parse
category.description: Parser output AST for all syntax constructs.
category.examples: parse__function_declaration, parse__pipe_operator, parse__model_definition, parse__match_expression, parse__fold_expression, parse__comprehension, parse__with_block

category.name: typecheck
category.description: Type checker output for various type scenarios.

category.name: mir
category.description: MIR dump output for key code patterns, before and after optimization.
category.examples: mir__simple_function, mir__tensor_ops, mir__after_dead_code, mir__after_fusion, mir__after_parallelize, mir__fold_lowering

category.name: llvm_ir
category.description: LLVM IR codegen output for critical patterns.

category.name: errors
category.description: Error message output for all error categories.

category.name: fusion
category.description: Fusion pattern matching output — before/after MIR.

workflow.step: 2. Run cargo insta test — generates pending snapshots.
3. Run cargo insta review — inspect and approve each snapshot.
5. CI runs cargo insta test --check — fails if snapshots don't match.

requirements.req: Benchmarks for each fusion pattern: fused vs unfused throughput.
Benchmarks for compile time: measure overhead of new passes.

layer.name: End-to-End Tests
layer.description: Full .axon programs that compile, run, and verify output.

requirements.req: At least one e2e test per major new feature.
E2e tests include the .axon source, expected stdout, and expected exit code.

programs.program: Compute fibonacci using fold. Verify output.
Two independent matmuls. Verify correct results.
Simple neural net forward pass. Verify fusion applied and correct output.
Linear parameter forward pass. Verify zero-copy behavior.
IO pipeline using with-block. Verify error propagation.
Tensor comprehension creating grid. Verify shape and values.

goldenRuns.description: Baseline test outputs captured at phase gates, stored in golden-runs/ directory.

contents.field: total_tests: number passing (must exceed alpha baseline)
total_tests: number passing (must exceed beta baseline)

test.name: Deep Nesting
test.description: 200-level nested expression to test stack safety with stacker.
test.expected: Compiles without stack overflow. Output correct.

test.name: Large Program
test.description: 1000-function program to test dead code elimination scalability.
test.expected: Dead code pass completes in <1 second. Only reachable functions remain.

test.name: Many Errors
test.description: Program with 50+ intentional errors to test diagnostics accumulation at scale.
test.expected: All 50 errors reported. No crash. Grouped display works.

test.name: Fusion Chain
test.description: Chain of 100 element-wise operations to test fusion pattern matching at scale.
test.expected: Fused to single kernel call. Compile time <5 seconds.

test.name: Parallel DAG Width
test.description: 50 independent tensor operations to test parallelism DAG builder at scale.
test.expected: All 50 identified as independent. Parallel dispatch emitted.

test.name: Interning Pressure
test.description: Program with 10,000 unique identifiers to test NameInterner memory and speed.
test.expected: Compiles. Memory usage within 2x of baseline. Identifier comparison is O(1).

gate.check: Diagnostics accumulate errors across parser + typeck in single compilation.
PassManager runs dead_code and const_fold without regression.
Fusion benchmarks: element-wise chain >= 3x throughput vs unfused.
Parallel scaling: >= 2x on 4 cores for independent matmul workloads.
Numerical equivalence: all fusion patterns within epsilon < 1e-6.
Parallel correctness: 1000-run comparison shows identical results.
ADT layout benchmarks complete for tagged vs packed.
All new syntax documented with examples.
